stack.filter.en: Idea stack filtered to active watchlist symbol — click Show all to reset.

stack.score.en: Idea score 0–100 — reliability × gates × walk-forward fit.

stack.reliability.en: Scanner pattern reliability for this symbol and setup.

stack.profit_factor.en: Backtest profit factor — gross wins divided by gross losses.

stack.drawdown.en: Maximum drawdown (rebaixamento) — peak-to-trough loss in backtest.

stack.confirm.en: Two-step confirm — gates, portfolio check, then paper execute.

stack.walk_forward.en: Walk-forward folds passed — out-of-sample validation badge.
